word: G749 - ἀρχιερεύς - archiereús - ar-khee-er-yuce' - Chief priest

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀρχιερεύς

- Transliteration: Archiereus

- Phonetic: ar-khee-er-yuce'

- Definition:

1. chief priest, high priest

- Origin: from G746 and G2409

- TDNT entry: 07:25,3

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: From G746 and G2409; the high priest (literally of the Jews typically christ); by extension a chief priest: - chief (high) priest chief of the priests.
